channel.title: Intro on TheKonnecting
channel.description: Recent content in Intro on TheKonnecting

item.title: Welcome to KatKonnecting
item.description:
Welcome!

This is your first blog post. Here’s what you can do:

  • Edit this file in content/blog/first-post.md
  • Add more posts in the same directory
  • Use Markdown formatting
  • Add tags and dates

To create a new post, use:

hugo new blog/post-name.md

Next Steps

  1. Push to GitHub
  2. GitHub Actions will automatically build and deploy
  3. Your site will be live at https://katkonnecting.github.io

Happy writing!
